title: tigridia hallbergii
intro: Tigridia hallbergii, also known as the Mexican shell flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tigridia hallbergii include its potential to help with wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting off infections. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
